claims.summary: The Minime runtime explicitly integrates autonomous-agent lifecycle and bounded action management.
claims.disposition: Verify the current imports, orchestration, and action-budget ownership from source.

claims.summary: Pressure and porosity review must remain evidence rather than a hidden control path.
claims.disposition: Verify current review surfaces are read-only and cannot mutate live regulation.

claims.summary: Pressure and Shadow posture can be compared to Astrid’s reported enclosure without changing either being.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded read-only pressure and Shadow trajectory comparison through sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Dynamic porosity or semantic bias would change live Minime behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold dynamic porosity and semantic-bias changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
